title: Value sampling features renamed
body:
The value sampling features in Genie have been renamed to better describe their function:

* [Prompt matching](/aws/en/genie/tune-quality#prompt-matching-overview) (previously value sampling)
* [Format assistance](/aws/en/genie/tune-quality#manage-format-assistance) (previously example values)
* [Entity matching](/aws/en/genie/tune-quality#configure-entity-matching) (previously value dictionaries)
